group.invisible: (field_partner_id == 0 and field_merchant_id == 0 and field_merchant_service_id == 0 and field_type_id == 0 and field_order_uid == 0 and field_project_uid == 0 and field_project_name == 0 and field_service_zone_id == 0 and field_service_type_id == 0 and field_sla_id == 0 and field_team_ids == 0 and field_user_ids == 0)

label.name: address_name
label.invisible: (field_merchant_service_street == 0 and field_merchant_service_street2 == 0 and field_merchant_service_zip == 0 and field_merchant_service_city == 0 and merchant_service_state_id == 0 and field_merchant_service_country_id == 0)

div.invisible: (field_merchant_service_street == 0 and field_merchant_service_street2 == 0 and field_merchant_service_zip == 0 and field_merchant_service_city == 0 and merchant_service_state_id == 0 and field_merchant_service_country_id == 0)

group.invisible: (field_product_ids == 0 and field_product_id == 0 and field_product_lot_id == 0 and field_product_lot_ref == 0 and field_product_owner == 0 and field_product_state == 0 and field_product_type == 0 and field_product_os == 0 and field_product_order_type == 0 and field_product_operation_type == 0 and field_product_subpartner == 0 and field_product_operator == 0)
(field_setup_uid == 0 and field_setup_key == 0 and field_setup_merchant_uid == 0 and field_setup_application_ids == 0)
(field_material_id == 0 and field_material_name == 0 and field_material_serial == 0 and field_material_count == 0)

(field_document_uid == 0 and field_document_type == 0 and field_document_name == 0 and field_document_info_vat == 0 and field_document_info_name == 0 and field_document_info_birthday == 0 and field_document_info_birthplace == 0 and field_document_info_iban == 0 and field_document_info_detail_ids == 0)

button.string: Stock move will be created with this todo

div.class: oe_kanban_card oe_kanban_global_click o_fsm_task_todo_kanban overflow-hidden p-0 rounded-2

div.t-attf-class: o_kanban_record_top bg-100 border-4 border-{{record.fulfilled.raw_value ? 'primary' : 'danger'}} border-start mx-4 my-3 p-3 rounded-2 shadow-sm text-center

span.class: d-inline-flex align-items-center border rounded-pill bg-500 text-white fw-bold
d-inline-flex align-items-center border rounded-pill bg-500 text-white fw-bold

button.string: Stock move will be created with this todo

div.class: d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-3 border pt-2 px-2 pb-1
border border-1 d-flex flex-fill align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-3 border pt-2 px-2 pb-1
border border 1 d-flex flex-fill align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-3 border pt-2 px-2 pb-1

button.name: action_photo
button.class: text-600 o_fsm_task_todo_type shadow-sm border border-1 mx-4 btn rounded-3 p-2 px-4
button.title: You cannot take photo because it marked as done.

button.name: action_photo
button.class: text-600 o_fsm_task_todo_type shadow-sm border border-1 mx-4 btn rounded-3 p-2 px-4

div.invisible: picking_ok == False or (picking_location_id != False and picking_location_dest_id != False and picking_product_lot_ok == False)
picking_ok == False or (picking_location_id != False and picking_location_dest_id != False and picking_product_lot_ok == False)

field.name: picking_product_lot_id
field.class: w-100 p-2 d-flex justify-content-center mt-1 mb-0
field.required: (picking_ok == True and picking_ids == [] and picking_product_lot_ok == True)
